description: Native Web Interface — Chat + Config Panel on localhost:7070

commands.get_panel_url: Returns the URL of the chat interface.
commands.open_browser: Opens the Zentra web interface in the default browser if not already open.
commands.set_state_manager: Injects the live StateManager from the main application.

function.name: WEB_UI__get_panel_url
function.description: Returns the URL of the chat interface.

function.name: WEB_UI__open_browser
function.description: Opens the Zentra web interface in the default browser if not already open.

function.name: WEB_UI__set_state_manager
function.description: Injects the live StateManager from the main application.
